GameSession.description: A game client user session, containing access/renewal token and user information.

access_token.description: The access token, used for authenticating requests. Sent as a cookie `cookie: session=<access_token>`, or alternatively, in the `authorization` header, like so `authorization: Bearer <access_token>`.

expires_in.description: The number of milliseconds until `access_token` expires. You'll usually be automatically assigned a new `access_token` via the `set-cookie` header before this time.

renewal_token.description: The renewal token, used for refreshing access token. Not implemented.

user_privilege_ruleset.description: A user's privilege ruleset, defining what they can do.
user_privilege_ruleset.title: UserPrivilegeRuleset

get.description:
This endpoint is called by the provider after the user has authenticated. The provider will include a code in the query string if the user has successfully authenticated, or an error if the user has not.

You should not call this endpoint directly. Instead, you should redirect the user to the URL returned by the `loginWithProvider` endpoint.
